summary: Regression testing after code quality refactoring. All 28 backend tests pass. All frontend UI flows working correctly. Fixed missing screen_batch function in opensanctions_service.py.
passed_tests: Backend: Login authentication with shyam@sentrixai.com / Sentrix@2024

Backend: Dashboard stats endpoint returns all required fields (total_customers, pending_reviews, high_risk_customers, open_cases, risk_distribution, screening_stats, kyc_stats, cdd_breakdown, integrations, api_usage)
Backend: POST /api/kyc/verify-pan with valid PAN format returns verification result (DEMO mode)
Backend: POST /api/kyc/verify-pan with invalid format returns 400
Backend: POST /api/kyc/verify-aadhaar with valid 12-digit number returns verification result
Backend: POST /api/kyc/verify-aadhaar with invalid format returns 400
Backend: POST /api/kyc/verify-passport with valid format returns verification result
Backend: POST /api/kyc/verify-voter-id with valid format returns verification result
Backend: POST /api/kyc/verify-driving-license with valid format returns verification result
Backend: GET /api/kyc/verifications/{customerId} returns verification history
Backend: GET /api/kyc/status returns Signzy integration status (demo mode)
Backend: POST /api/api-keys creates new API key with api_key and secret_key
Backend: POST /api/api-keys without client_name returns 400
Backend: GET /api/api-keys lists all API keys
Backend: GET /api/api-keys/usage returns usage stats (total_calls, today_calls, active_keys)
Backend: GET /api/api-keys/integration-status returns signzy and opensanctions status
Backend: PUT /api/api-keys/{id}/revoke revokes API key
Backend: POST /api/v1/screen without X-API-Key returns 401
Backend: POST /api/v1/screen with valid API key returns screening result
Backend: POST /api/v1/screening/individual returns individual screening result
Backend: POST /api/v1/screening/batch returns batch screening results
Backend: POST /api/v1/screening/batch with empty array returns 400
Backend: POST /api/v1/risk/score returns risk score with breakdown and recommendations
Backend: POST /api/v1/risk/score without customerId returns 400
Backend: POST /api/screening/run-quick (authenticated) returns quick screening result
Backend: POST /api/screening/run-quick with KYC check returns KYC result
Backend: POST /api/screening/run-quick without name returns 400
Frontend: Login page loads and accepts credentials
Frontend: Dashboard shows all stat cards (Total Customers, Pending Reviews, High Risk, Open Cases)
Frontend: Dashboard shows Risk Distribution section
Frontend: Dashboard shows Screening Alerts section (Sanctions, PEP, Adverse Media)
Frontend: Dashboard shows KYC & Due Diligence section with CDD Tiers
Frontend: Dashboard shows Integration Status (Signzy DEMO, OpenSanctions DEMO)
Frontend: Dashboard shows API Usage section (Total Calls, Active Keys)
Frontend: Dashboard shows Recent Customers list
Frontend: Dashboard shows Open Cases list
Frontend: API Keys page shows usage stats (Total API Calls, Today's Calls, Active Keys)
Frontend: API Keys page Create Key button works
Frontend: API Keys page lists existing keys with Active/Revoked status
Frontend: Screening Hub shows integration status cards with DEMO badge
Frontend: Screening Hub Individual tab has all form fields (name, nationality, dob, id type)
Frontend: Screening Hub check toggles work (sanctions, pep, kyc)
Frontend: Screening Hub Run Screening returns result with risk level
Frontend: Screening Hub Batch tab present
Frontend: Customer Detail page shows KYC Document Verification Card with DEMO MODE badge
Frontend: Customer Detail page has all 5 KYC document tabs (PAN, Aadhaar, Passport, Voter ID, DL)
Frontend: Customer Detail page KYC verification works and shows result
Frontend: Customer Detail page shows verification history
Frontend: Customer Detail page shows CDD/EDD Management card with tier info
Frontend: CDDManagementCard renders CDD tier, status, and update buttons without errors
Frontend: Sidebar has all navigation items (Dashboard, Customers, Screening, Cases, API Keys, Audit Logs, Settings)
Frontend: All navigation links work correctly
Code Quality: No console.error statements in pages/components (replaced with logger utility)
Code Quality: shared/deps.py module eliminates circular imports
Code Quality: dashboard_service.py extracts dashboard stats logic
Code Quality: risk_service.py extracts risk scoring logic with calculate_v1_risk_score
Code Quality: CDDManagementCard uses helper functions instead of nested ternaries
seed_data_creation: Created test API keys and customers during testing (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Code quality refactoring verified. All features working: Signzy KYC Mock (PAN, Aadhaar, Passport, Voter ID, DL verification), OpenSanctions Mock Screening (sanctions, PEP, batch), Public API v1 (screen, screening/individual, screening/batch, risk/score), API Key Management (create, list, revoke, usage stats), Quick Screening endpoint. Fixed missing screen_batch function in opensanctions_service.py. The shared/deps.py module eliminates circular imports - routes now call from shared.deps instead of server.py. Dashboard stats extracted to dashboard_service.py. Risk scoring extracted to risk_service.py. All console.error replaced with logger utility. CDDManagementCard uses helper functions instead of nested ternaries.

mocked_apis.signzy_service.py: KYC verification (PAN, Aadhaar, Passport, Voter ID, DL) returns mock results with 80% success rate
mocked_apis.opensanctions_service.py: Sanctions/PEP/batch screening returns mock results with 30% match rate

refactoring_verified.circular_imports_eliminated: shared/deps.py module created, routes use from shared.deps import get_current_user, get_db, log_audit
refactoring_verified.console_error_replaced: All 27 console.error calls replaced with logger utility from utils/logger.js
refactoring_verified.nested_ternaries_fixed: CDDManagementCard uses getCDDTierColor, getCDDTierLabel, getCDDStatusBadge helper functions
refactoring_verified.frontend_components_split: KYCVerificationCard split into KYCDocForm + KYCResultDisplay, ScreeningHubPage split into IndividualScreeningForm + ScreeningResultCard

bug_fixed.fix: Added screen_batch async function that iterates over individuals and calls screen_individual for each
